description: DSP audience report with segment-level metrics. Joins dsp_lineitem and dsp_order for dimension enrichment.
DSP creative structure table with creative metadata (name, type, size).
DSP creative report with daily performance metrics (impressions, clicks, spend, sales).
DSP line item structure table with line item metadata (name, type, budget).
DSP line item report with daily performance metrics (impressions, clicks, spend, conversions).
DSP order structure table with order metadata (name, goal, budget, status).
DSP order report with daily performance metrics (impressions, clicks, spend, sales, conversions).
DSP product report with daily product-level performance metrics.
Vendor Central coupon performance metrics — clips, redemptions, budget utilisation per coupon.
Vendor Central purchase orders from Amazon — order state, quantities ordered/accepted/rejected/received, costs, and party details.
Vendor Central purchase order item quantity change history — tracks accepted, rejected, and received quantity updates.
Vendor Central Retail Analytics inventory health by ASIN — on-hand sellable/unsellable inventory, net received inventory, open PO units, sell-through rate.
Vendor Central demand forecast by ASIN — mean and percentile (P70/P80/P90) forecast units for upcoming periods.
Vendor Central Net Pure Product Margin (Net PPM) by ASIN over time.
Account-level daily summary combining advertising metrics with organic/retail metrics.
Ad-level product performance at the product x campaign x adgroup grain. Contains ONLY advertising metrics.
Campaign-level daily summary with advertising metrics, budget pacing, placement data, and NTB metrics.
Search term level daily summary with advertising metrics at the search term x campaign x adgroup grain.
Keyword-level daily summary with advertising metrics at the keyword x match type x campaign x adgroup grain.
Label-level daily summary with advertising metrics grouped by user-defined labels.
Holistic product-level daily summary combining advertising metrics with organic/retail metrics.
Product target level daily summary with advertising metrics at the target x campaign x adgroup grain.
Current inventory quantities and pricing by ASIN/SKU. Covers merchant-fulfilled (FBM) stock levels.
FBA inventory health with aging analysis, storage fee projections, sell-through velocity, competitive pricing, and recommendations.
FBA restock recommendations showing current stock breakdown, sales velocity, replenishment quantities, and ship dates.
Individual order line items from Seller Central All Orders report with pricing, shipping, and fulfillment details.
FBA customer returns with return reason, disposition, and fulfillment center details.
FBA monthly storage fee charges by ASIN/FNSKU and fulfillment center.
FBA outbound shipments with shipment details, carrier/tracking info, and shipping geography.
Settlement report with financial line items — revenue, fees, promotions, taxes per transaction.
FBA long-term storage fee (LTSF) charges by ASIN/FNSKU with quantity, amount, and age tier.
FBA fulfilled inventory snapshot — current available quantity and condition per SKU.
Coupon performance metrics — clips, redemptions, budget usage, sales, and discount details.
Subscribe & Save forecast — active subscriptions and scheduled unit forecasts for next 8 weeks.
Subscribe & Save performance — shipped units, OOS rates, sale prices, and discounts for last 4 weeks.
